column1: # /Worksheet Global Recalc Automatic|Manual toggles the recalc mode.
# Manual stops auto-recalc and lights the CALC indicator; F9 or switching
# Seed: A1 = 10, B1 = +A1*2 (auto-recalcs in Automatic mode)
# Change A1 to 100. In Manual mode, B1 does NOT auto-recompute;
# /WGRA switches back to Automatic; this triggers recalc and clears CALC.
